summary: Post-refactoring verification complete. Fixed missing context parameters in useDashboardStream hook (setBuildLog, setBuildMilestones, setAssetsRefreshKey, briefBuildActiveRef). All unit tests (18/18), integration tests (4/4) pass. Dashboard.jsx properly imports useDashboardStream hook with all required context. Frontend login and dashboard functionality verified via Playwright.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows '[authFetch] getSession error: Cannot destructure property data' but login still works

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: useDashboardStream.js was missing 4 context parameters (setBuildLog, setBuildMilestones, setAssetsRefreshKey, briefBuildActiveRef) that were used but not passed from Dashboard.jsx
Dashboard.jsx now passes all required context to useDashboardStream hook at line 714
useDashboardStream.js now destructures all 4 additional parameters at line 56
useEffect ordering fix verified: Aurora activity decay effect (line 720-743) is correctly placed AFTER useDashboardStream hook call (line 689-714)
streamingMessageId is properly initialized as null before being used in useEffect
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 86 fixed missing context parameters in useDashboardStream hook. The hook now receives setBuildLog, setBuildMilestones, setAssetsRefreshKey, and briefBuildActiveRef from Dashboard.jsx. All streaming functionality should work correctly now.

login_flow.note: Login with testprov@test.com / password123 works, redirects to dashboard

console_errors.note: No errors related to streamingMessageId, sendMessage, or useDashboardStream

files_verified: Dashboard.jsx passes all context to useDashboardStream at lines 701-715
useDashboardStream.js destructures all context parameters at lines 43-56
Aurora activity decay useEffect correctly placed after hook call

bug_fix_applied.issue: Missing context parameters in useDashboardStream hook
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: When streaming logic was extracted from Dashboard.jsx to useDashboardStream.js, 4 context parameters (setBuildLog, setBuildMilestones, setAssetsRefreshKey, briefBuildActiveRef) were used in the hook but not passed from Dashboard.jsx
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added the 4 missing parameters to both the context object passed from Dashboard.jsx and the destructuring in useDashboardStream.js
